description: Up your semi-formal style statement with this leather and canvas combination wallet from wrangler. Stylish, yet practical, this wallet makes for a fab accessory. Open width: 22.5 Height: 9 cm Made of leather with a canvas upper Press button closure Two main compartments to hold currency notes Left flap has a side compartment and card holders above it Right flap has a side compartment and a coin pouch above it with a press button flap closure Care Wipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust
